description: Editorial automotive showcase section with service highlights, large stats, overlapping images, an experience badge, and a three-column feature card.
goals: Keep service titles exactly as specified and in uppercase
Preserve exactly four service items, two stats, and three feature-list columns
Maintain a premium automotive tone with concise, high-clarity supporting copy

fieldGuidance.leftIntro.eyebrow: Keep this exact phrase unless the design direction changes.
fieldGuidance.services[].title: Keep these titles exactly as provided in the brief and preserve uppercase styling.
fieldGuidance.services[].text: Use 16-26 words explaining one practical customer benefit.
fieldGuidance.stats[].value: Use short, bold numeric proof points such as 2K+ or 99%+.
fieldGuidance.featurePanel.columns[].items[]: Use single benefit phrases in uppercase.
fieldGuidance.images.badgeValue: Use a short numeric proof point such as 15+.
